content: لاَزِم تِسَييِف شُغْلَك عَلى اِلكُمبيوتر قَبل ما تِقفِلُه
translations: eng:you have to save your work on the computer before you switch it off

transcriptions.arabizi: laezim tisayyif shughl|ak Aala ilkumbootir 'ablama ti'fil|uh
